    "System successfully evacuated below 500 microns",
    "Standing decay test passed with pressure stabilizing below 500 microns after 10 minutes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Proceed to charge the refrigeration system with refrigerant"
  ],
  "rationale": "The system was evacuated to 332 microns. After isolating the pump for 10 minutes, the pressure rose to 436 microns and stabilized. Because the pressure remained well below the industry-standard threshold of 500 microns and did not continuously rise to atmospheric pressure, this indicates a tight, dry system free of leaks and moisture.",
  "references": [
    "EPA Section 608",
    "Industry Standard Evacuation and Decay Test Procedures"
  ]
